name: Spiced Gingerbread
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Brandy, fruit juice or coffee
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Cream together the shortening and orange rind until smooth.
3. Gradually add brown sugar and beat thoroughly to make a smooth batter.
4. Beat in well beaten eggs for 1-2 minutes.
5. Sift flour, soda, salt, cinnamon, mace, nutmeg together.
6. Alternately mix in the molasses and orange juice/brandy mixture with the flour mixture until combined.
7. Add raisins to the batter.
8. Pour into a greased and floured 8-inch X 12-inch X 2-1/2-inch pan.
9. Bake for 30-35 minutes.
George Washington's mother's recipe uses no ginger. Fruit juice or coffee may be substituted for brandy.
